message:
fix: slash menu pre-selection and multi-line input overflow (#6, #7)

- fix(autocomplete): start popup with no pre-selected item (Option<usize>
  instead of usize), requiring explicit arrow navigation before accept (#6)
- fix(tui): reserve extra column for cursor character to prevent input
  text from overwriting UI border elements on full-width lines (#7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
